description_long: This is an adult pedestrian dressed in modern urban attire, featuring a hooded jacket with a cropped design and a large metallic necklace. The individual wears fitted leggings and open-toed sandals, with a visible tattoo on the midriff and a face mask covering the lower half of the face. The hood is up, partially concealing the hair, and the jacket has colorful stripes and text details on the sleeves. The figure's stance is relaxed, with arms slightly bent and hands open at the sides. Accessories include a large necklace and a face mask, contributing to a contemporary streetwear look.
description: An adult pedestrian in urban streetwear, wearing a hooded cropped jacket, leggings, sandals, a face mask, and a large necklace.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded jacket, face mask, necklace, tattoo, and open-toed sandals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, the cropped jacket, and the fitted leggings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hood, jacket, and leggings, with the jacket's colorful stripes visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the hood, jacket, and leggings.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a cropped hooded jacket, fitted leggings, and a face mask
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair with side-swept bangs, partially covered by hood
